transcript:
CALLER: Uh, hello. I have an appointment day after tomorrow but I need to shift it to next week. Something came up at work.
AGENT: No problem at all! Let me find your booking. May I have your name and contact number?
CALLER: Nalini Krishnan. 9944332211.
AGENT: Found it — you have an appointment with Dr. Sunita Rao in the ophthalmology department this Thursday at noon. What dates work for you next week?
CALLER: Umm, Monday or Tuesday, either is fine. Same time if possible.
AGENT: Monday noon with Dr. Sunita Rao is available. Shall I confirm that?
CALLER: Yes, please go ahead.
AGENT: Done! Your appointment has been rescheduled to Monday next week at 12 PM with Dr. Sunita Rao. You'll get an updated confirmation SMS. Is there anything else?
CALLER: No, that's perfect. Thank you!
AGENT: Take care, Ms. Krishnan. See you Monday!
